name: Thayer Ventures Acquisition Corp II
summary: Thayer Ventures Acquisition Corporation II is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempt company, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has generated no operating revenues and focuses on identifying acquisition targets in the travel and transportation industries, leveraging its management team's investment experience in those sectors.
